entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: The individual using the knowledge system

entities.name: knowledge system
entities.context: The system utilized by V for managing tweets

entities.name: pending
entities.context: Command to show tweets worth engaging with

entities.name: angles
entities.context: Command to get angles/hooks for a tweet

entities.name: draft
entities.context: Command to draft tweets based on direction

entities.name: run
entities.context: Command to execute the full pipeline

entities.name: pangram
entities.context: Command to test output against AI detection

relationships.context: V employs the knowledge system for tweet management
V uses the status command to check system status
V uses the poll command to fetch tweets
V uses the pending command to identify engaging tweets
V uses angles command to identify hooks for tweets
V uses draft command to create tweet drafts
V uses run command to execute the pipeline
V uses pangram command to test output
